title: Breathing reset
description: Inhale for 4 counts, hold for 2, exhale for 6. Repeat five times before appointments or scans.

title: Question list for appointments
description: Write symptoms, dates, medicines, allergies, family history, and the top three questions you need answered.

title: Caregiver check-in
description: Ask: What do you need today? What can I take off your list? Who should we contact next?

title: Urgent help reminder
description: If you feel unsafe, severely distressed, or at risk of self-harm, contact local emergency services or a trusted person immediately.
